_note: Tie case (pre-locked decision): list_price_cents=2850, max_discount_pct=0.0 → floor=ceil(2850*1.0)=2850. Competitor at €28.50 (2850 cents). edge_step_cents=1. targetUndercut=2850-1=2849, candidate=max(2849,2850)=2850. candidate(2850)==competitorLowest(2850) → HOLD + hold-floor-bound (NOT undercut — coin-flip with margin sacrifice is strictly worse).
